chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ahmad Ibn Hilal

text: و ما كان فيه عن أحمد بن هلال فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن هلال‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Ahmad ibn Hilal, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Hilal.
